title: tragia volubilis var. genuina
intro: Tragia volubilis var. genuina is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. It is a creeping or climbing perennial herb, traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and relief from skin irritations. Tragia volubilis var. genuina can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are used to treat various health conditions.
